items.label: Email & push campaigns
items.blurb: Send marketing emails and push notifications, track opens.
items.mcpAuthHint: Bearer = Notifuse API key. Default key pre-wired in chat (workspace: intelliversex).

items.label: WhatsApp Business (OpenBSP)
items.blurb: Send and reply on WhatsApp via the Evolution panel.
items.mcpAuthHint: Bearer = OpenBSP API key. Default key pre-wired in chat.

items.label: Make / receive phone calls
items.blurb: VoIP — outbound calls, inbound IVRs, recordings.
items.mcpAuthHint: Bearer = accessKeyId:apiKey:apiSecret (Workspace → API Keys)

items.label: Schedule a social-media post (Postiz)
items.blurb: Schedule on Instagram, X, LinkedIn, TikTok from one calendar.
items.mcpAuthHint: Postiz wrapper MCP: access must be assigned through the configured workspace; do not assume an embedded credential. List integrations first and publish only to selected connected channels. Tools: postiz_list_integrations, postiz_list_posts, postiz_find_slot, postiz_create_post, postiz_upload_from_url, postiz_analytics. Use admin_call_mcp tileId 'postiz'.

items.label: CRM — contacts & deals (Twenty)
items.blurb: Track people, companies, and your sales pipeline.
items.mcpAuthHint: Bearer = Twenty API key (Settings → Developers → API Keys)

items.label: Shared inbox (Chatwoot)
items.blurb: One inbox for email, chat, and social conversations with customers.
items.mcpAuthHint: Bearer = Chatwoot access token (Profile → Access Token)

items.label: Newsletters (beehiiv)
items.blurb: Grow and send newsletters; manage subscribers and segments.
items.mcpAuthHint: Official beehiiv MCP (OAuth). Self-hosted alt: beehiiv-mcp.intelli-verse-x.ai (Bearer = API key)

items.label: Telephony & SMS APIs (Telnyx)
items.blurb: Programmable voice, SMS, and numbers. Portal for config; MCP for agents.
items.mcpAuthHint: Focused wrapper MCP (send SMS, numbers, balance, history). Default key pre-wired; override with Bearer.

items.label: AI UI design (Google Stitch)
items.blurb: Design app screens and web UIs from a text prompt — generate, iterate, export clean HTML/CSS or paste to Figma. Free Google Labs tool; the copilot can drive it via MCP once a key is connected.
items.mcpAuthHint: Google Stitch official hosted MCP. Auth header X-Goog-Api-Key = Stitch API key (stitch.withgoogle.com → account settings). Tools: list_projects, create_project, list_screens, get_screen, generate_screen_from_text, edit_screens. Use admin_call_mcp tileId 'stitch'.

items.label: Generate QR codes
items.blurb: Dynamic + static QR codes with designer styling, retargetable smartlinks, hosted landing pages and per-scan analytics.
items.mcpAuthHint: Wrapper MCP (31 tools, full QR Studio coverage): qr_list/qr_get (start here), qr_create/qr_update/qr_delete (dynamic QRs stay retargetable after printing), qr_preview + qr_render (styled previews without saving), qr_bulk_create (CSV), qr_image_url/qr_download_url (S3 links), qr_landing_get/upsert (hosted landing pages), qr_webhooks_* (scan events), qr_scans_* + qr_analytics_overview/timeseries/breakdown/export (analytics — default to the house tenant; pass qrId or tenantId from a qr_list row to scope elsewhere), qr_apikeys_* (public REST keys), qr_asset_upload_presign/qr_asset_confirm/qr_assets_list/qr_asset_delete (logo + media uploads for designs and landing pages), qr_payload_build, qr_whoami, qr_health. Service-account JWT pre-wired; no token needed. In-cluster only — use admin_call_mcp tileId 'qrstudio'.

items.label: Project plans (LeanTime)
items.mcpAuthHint: Bearer = Leantime API key. Default key pre-wired in chat.

items.label: Build an automation (n8n)
items.blurb: Drag-and-drop workflow automation.
items.mcpAuthHint: Wrapper MCP: list/inspect workflows, activate/deactivate, inspect executions. Default scoped key pre-wired.

items.label: Player accounts (Nakama Console)
items.blurb: Find a player, ban / unban, look at leaderboards.
items.mcpAuthHint: Game-ops MCP (player inspect, wallets, flags, configs). Server-side admin auth pre-wired; no token needed.

items.label: Quests & rewards
items.blurb: QuestX rewards economy — brands, quests, offers, redemptions, gift cards, fraud checks. Also drivable from the admin copilot chat (~120 MCP tools).
items.mcpAuthHint: No token needed. In-cluster only — reach it through admin-mcp's admin_call_mcp (tileId: quests).

items.label: System health dashboards (Grafana)
items.blurb: Pending public ingress (issue #25).
items.mcpAuthHint: Official grafana/mcp-grafana (65 tools, session handshake): dashboards CRUD/search, datasources, PromQL (query_prometheus — pass startTime AND endTime, e.g. 'now'), LogQL via Grafana (query_loki_logs, list_loki_label_names/values, datasourceUid 'loki'), alert rules, annotations, folders, teams. Viewer SA token pre-wired.

items.label: Cluster logs (Loki)
items.blurb: Search every pod's logs across the cluster — errors, crash loops, noisy services — straight from chat via LogQL or plain filters.
items.mcpAuthHint: Direct Loki MCP (42 tools, session handshake, fork of abl030/loki-mcp): loki_search_logs (no LogQL needed), loki_error_summary, loki_query_range/instant, labels/series discovery, index stats/volume, loki_get_overview. Mutations need confirm=true. In-cluster only — use admin_call_mcp tileId 'loki'.

items.label: Cloud costs & infrastructure (AWS)
items.blurb: Account spend by service, daily trend, month-end forecast, and EKS cluster/nodegroup state — ask the copilot, no console login needed.
items.mcpAuthHint: Wrapper MCP: aws_cost_by_service, aws_cost_daily, aws_cost_forecast, aws_eks_list_clusters, aws_eks_list_nodegroups. s3-user IAM key pre-wired (read-only). In-cluster only — use admin_call_mcp tileId 'aws'. Deploys/restarts: intelliverse gateway k8s_* tools.

items.label: Identity verification (Didit)
items.blurb: KYC/KYB sessions: who verified, who got declined, full decision details, and mint a hosted verification link for a user — ask the copilot, no dashboard login needed.
items.mcpAuthHint: Wrapper MCP: didit_list_sessions (start here — filter by status/vendorData), didit_session_decision, didit_session_reviews (manual review activity), didit_list_workflows, didit_webhook_config, didit_billing_balance (credits), didit_create_session (mints a hosted verification link; uses credits), didit_setup_status. Application API key pre-wired; override with Bearer = Didit x-api-key. In-cluster only — use admin_call_mcp tileId 'didit'.

items.label: Identity verification (Veriff)
items.blurb: Verification session verdicts, extracted person data and PEP/sanctions screening by session id, plus new hosted verification links — ask the copilot.
items.mcpAuthHint: Wrapper MCP: veriff_session_decision / veriff_session_person / veriff_watchlist_screening (by sessionId — Veriff has no list endpoint), veriff_session_media / veriff_session_attempts / veriff_attempt_media (captured document photos + videos), veriff_create_session, veriff_setup_status. Integration key pair pre-wired; override with Bearer = 'apiKey:sharedSecret'. If calls fail run veriff_setup_status — the integration may need activating in the Veriff portal. In-cluster only — use admin_call_mcp tileId 'veriff'.

items.label: Payments revenue (Stripe)
items.blurb: How much money came in: balance, revenue summary with fees and refunds, subscriptions, invoices, payouts and disputes — ask the copilot, no dashboard login needed.
items.mcpAuthHint: Wrapper MCP (read-only): stripe_revenue_summary, stripe_balance, stripe_list_charges, stripe_list_subscriptions, stripe_list_invoices, stripe_list_payouts, stripe_list_refunds_disputes, stripe_list_customers, stripe_list_products_prices. Live secret key pre-wired. In-cluster only — use admin_call_mcp tileId 'stripe'.

items.label: App-store revenue (RevenueCat)
items.blurb: Mobile in-app purchases and subscriptions: MRR, active subscriptions, 28-day revenue, per-customer purchase history — ask the copilot, no dashboard login needed.
items.mcpAuthHint: Wrapper MCP (read-only): revenuecat_list_projects (start here), revenuecat_overview_metrics (MRR/active subs/revenue), revenuecat_list_apps/products/entitlements/offerings, revenuecat_list_customers, revenuecat_get_customer. Secret key from revenuecat-mcp-secret. In-cluster only — use admin_call_mcp tileId 'revenuecat'.

items.label: Visualize anything (charts, dashboards, videos)
items.blurb: Ask the copilot to visualize any metric: it renders hosted charts (PNG), interactive dashboards, animated HTML and short MP4 videos, and shows them inline in the chat.
items.mcpAuthHint: Wrapper MCP (create-artifact only): viz_render_image (chart spec/HTML → PNG), viz_render_dashboard (KPIs + charts → hosted HTML page), viz_render_html (HTML/GSAP scene → hosted page), viz_render_video (scene spec → MP4). Every tool uploads to S3 and returns a servable URL — always show it. Gather metrics from the analytics MCPs first. In-cluster only — use admin_call_mcp tileId 'viz'.

items.label: Mobile attribution (AppsFlyer)
items.blurb: Where installs come from and what they're worth: campaign performance, ROAS, LTV, retention cohorts, SKAN, OneLink and Audiences — ask the copilot, no AppsFlyer login needed.
items.mcpAuthHint: AppsFlyer official MCP (read-oriented): campaign performance, ROAS/LTV/retention cohorts, SKAN, SSOT metrics, OneLink templates, Audiences. Bearer = AppsFlyer MCP token (HQ → Security Center → AppsFlyer Tokens → MCP token); default or per-app token via connector request. Use admin_call_mcp tileId 'appsflyer'.

items.label: Product analytics (PostHog)
items.blurb: Insights, dashboards, HogQL queries, session replays, feature flags and error tracking — ask the copilot, no PostHog login needed.
items.mcpAuthHint: PostHog official hosted MCP. Bearer = personal API key (phx_..., Settings → Personal API keys); platform default via POSTHOG_MCP_TOKEN (secret posthog-mcp-secret). Use admin_call_mcp tileId 'posthog'.

items.label: Mobile attribution (Adjust)
items.blurb: Installs, ad spend, ROAS, retention cohorts and fraud stats by network/campaign from the Adjust Reports Service — ask the copilot, no Adjust login needed.
items.mcpAuthHint: Wrapper MCP (read-only): adjust_apps_list (start here), adjust_report (dimensions × metrics × date range: installs, cost, ROAS by network/campaign), adjust_cohorts (retention_by_network / fraud_overview presets), adjust_filters_data (discover metric slugs). API token from adjust-mcp-secret. In-cluster only — use admin_call_mcp tileId 'adjust'.

items.label: Accounting & books (QuickBooks)
items.blurb: P&L, balance sheet, cash flow, expenses, invoices and customer balances straight from QuickBooks Online — ask the copilot, no QuickBooks login needed. Tax prep (TurboTax has no API) rides on this data.
items.mcpAuthHint: Wrapper MCP (read-first): qb_profit_and_loss (start here), qb_balance_sheet, qb_cash_flow, qb_expenses_list, qb_invoices_list, qb_customers_list, qb_query (SELECT-only QBO SQL). OAuth refresh flow baked from quickbooks-mcp-secret. In-cluster only — use admin_call_mcp tileId 'quickbooks'.

items.label: Web & app analytics (Google Analytics 4)
items.blurb: Traffic per app-id: active users, sessions, top pages, traffic sources, events, realtime — ask the copilot with the app-id (quizverse, questx, ...), no GA login needed.
items.mcpAuthHint: Wrapper MCP (app-id keyed): ga4_list_apps (start here), ga4_traffic_summary, ga4_top_pages, ga4_traffic_sources, ga4_events, ga4_countries, ga4_realtime. Every tool takes appId (quizverse, questx, ...). NOT ONBOARDED YET? Run ga4_setup_status — it returns step-by-step instructions, and property ids can be saved in-chat with ga4_onboard_app (persists, no restart). In-cluster only — use admin_call_mcp tileId 'ga4'.

items.label: Google Search performance (Search Console)
items.blurb: Organic search per app-id: clicks, impressions, top queries and pages, sitemaps, URL index checks — ask the copilot with the app-id, no Search Console login needed.
items.mcpAuthHint: Wrapper MCP (app-id keyed): gsc_list_sites (start here), gsc_search_summary, gsc_top_queries, gsc_top_pages, gsc_by_country_device, gsc_sitemaps, gsc_inspect_url. Every tool takes appId (quizverse, questx, ...). NOT ONBOARDED YET? Run gsc_setup_status — it returns step-by-step instructions, and sites can be saved in-chat with gsc_onboard_app (persists, no restart). In-cluster only — use admin_call_mcp tileId 'gsc'.

items.label: Apple App Store data (App Store Connect)
items.blurb: iOS fleet per app-id: release states, customer reviews, ratings, daily sales reports — ask the copilot with the app-id, no App Store Connect login needed.
items.mcpAuthHint: Wrapper MCP (app-id keyed): appstore_list_apps (start here — live team apps + app-id mapping), appstore_app_overview, appstore_latest_reviews, appstore_ratings_summary, appstore_sales_report. Tools take appId (quizverse, questx, ...) or a raw appleAppId. ASC team key pre-wired. NOT ONBOARDED YET? Run appstore_setup_status; mappings save in-chat via appstore_onboard_app, sales unlock via appstore_set_vendor_number. In-cluster only — use admin_call_mcp tileId 'appstore'.

items.label: Google Play Console data
items.blurb: Android fleet per app-id: Play Store reviews, IAP products, subscriptions, crash/ANR quality rates — ask the copilot with the app-id, no Play Console login needed.
items.mcpAuthHint: Wrapper MCP (app-id keyed): playstore_list_apps (start here), playstore_latest_reviews, playstore_iap_products, playstore_subscriptions, playstore_crash_anr_rates. Tools take appId (quizverse, questx, ...) or a raw packageName. NOT ONBOARDED YET? Run playstore_setup_status — it returns step-by-step instructions, and packages can be saved in-chat with playstore_onboard_app (persists, no restart). In-cluster only — use admin_call_mcp tileId 'playstore'.

items.label: YouTube channel performance
items.blurb: Subscribers, total views, top and newest videos with per-video stats for the house channel — ask the copilot, no YouTube login needed.
items.mcpAuthHint: Wrapper MCP (read-only, public data): youtube_channel_stats (start here — defaults to the house channel), youtube_recent_videos, youtube_top_videos, youtube_video_stats, youtube_search_channel. Any public channelId can be passed. API key pre-wired. In-cluster only — use admin_call_mcp tileId 'youtube'.

items.label: Admin portal MCP
items.blurb: MCP server over the tile registry: list tools, preflight, launch URLs, gateway to per-service MCPs.
items.mcpAuthHint: Bearer = ADMIN_MCP_TOKEN (secret admin-mcp-token, ns aicart)

items.label: Coding crew (Gas Town)
items.blurb: Autonomous AI engineers on our repositories — assign coding tasks from the copilot chat, watch crews and work batches live here.
items.mcpAuthHint: Wrapper MCP: gastown_list_repos, gastown_assign_coding_task, gastown_work_batches, gastown_completed_work. No token; in-cluster only — use admin_call_mcp tileId 'gastown'. Assigning spawns real coding agents that open PRs.

items.label: Intelliverse MCP gateway
items.blurb: What Cursor/Claude talk through; auto-refreshes IV service tokens.
items.mcpAuthHint: Bearer = Intelliverse MCP API key. Default key pre-wired in chat (~1300 platform tools).

items.label: Streaming MCP server
items.blurb: Python streamable-http MCP for long-running agent jobs.
items.mcpAuthHint: Content Factory agent MCP (pipeline runs, releases, ads, analytics). No token needed; session handshake handled by gateway.

items.label: E-signatures & contracts (Documenso)
items.blurb: Send documents for signature; optional signer payments via Stripe.
items.mcpAuthHint: Bearer = team-scoped Documenso API token (Settings → API Tokens; default wired in chat). Full lifecycle: documenso_use_template (formValues/prefillFields), documenso_upload_document (PDF), recipients/fields CRUD, send/resend, download, direct links, folders.

items.label: SEO research
items.mcpAuthHint: OpenSEO MCP: keyword research, SERP, domain overview, rank tracker. Self-hosted (no token).

items.label: Web scraping & research (Firecrawl)
items.blurb: Read any webpage with AI: scrape pages to clean markdown, web search, whole-site crawls and structured data extraction — ask the copilot, no Firecrawl login needed.
items.mcpAuthHint: Firecrawl official hosted MCP: firecrawl_scrape (URL → markdown), firecrawl_search (web/news/images), firecrawl_map (site URLs), firecrawl_crawl (multi-page), firecrawl_extract (structured data) + research tools. Bearer = Firecrawl API key (fc-...); platform default wired. Use admin_call_mcp tileId 'firecrawl'.
